about.title: Thirty-five years building anywhere in the world
about.p1: Metalbox was born from one conviction: modular construction is not an alternative; it is the smartest way to build. Behind that conviction stands a career: that of Jesús Rabadán, founder and project director, with more than 35 years leading modular and industrial construction across three continents.
about.p2: From Congo to Germany, through France, Gabon and Lebanon, Jesús has led multidisciplinary teams in some of the most demanding environments there are: industrial plants, emergency healthcare projects, modular building in complex logistical contexts. That experience now defines the Metalbox standard: technical rigour, deadlines met, and solutions that work in the real world.
about.p3: Every Metalbox project is run with the same philosophy: technical excellence, transparent communication and solid, sustainable results. We don't promise. We deliver.
about.quote: My commitment is to bring experience, rigour and leadership to turn every project into a solid, sustainable result.

timeline.text: Team supervision and delivery of technical projects in modular and industrial construction.
Site management of modular and industrial projects, team coordination and quality control.
Management and delivery of industrial projects in complex logistical environments.
Leadership of modular construction projects and optimisation of multidisciplinary resources.
Assemblies in gas plants and specialised industrial projects, team leadership.

items.a: An industrialised building system in which buildings are manufactured in modules in a controlled environment and assembled at their final location. The result: lead times up to 60% shorter, fixed costs and a consistent quality impossible to guarantee on a traditional site.

items.q: How long does a modular construction project take?
items.a: It depends on floor area and finish level, but as a reference: a standard module can be installed within weeks and a complete building within a few months. Factory production overlaps with foundation work, dramatically reducing the overall schedule.

items.q: Can a modular building be customised?
items.a: Completely. Layout, façades, joinery, services, interior finishes and equipment are all designed to each client's specification. Industrialisation standardises the process, not the design.

The same as traditional construction when the building is permanent: a building permit and technical project. For temporary installations the process is usually faster. We advise you throughout the administrative process.
Yes. We manufacture, deliver and install nationwide, with our logistics base in Barcelona, and we have proven experience in international projects.

items.q: Do you work for companies and public administrations?
items.a: Yes. Companies, public administrations and private clients. We have extensive experience in tenders and institutional projects: schools, healthcare centres, changing facilities and industrial buildings.
It is our speciality: study, design, manufacturing, transport and installation with a single point of contact and full responsibility for the result.
Yes. From individual modules to complete multi-storey buildings: classroom blocks, residences, offices, healthcare centres and special projects.

items.q: What maintenance does a modular building require?
items.a: The same as any quality conventional building: periodic checks of services and envelope. Industrialised materials are highly durable and interventions are simpler and more economical.

items.q: How can I request a quote?
items.a: Click any "Request a quote" button on this website and complete the form, call us on +34 638 71 21 08, or write to administracion@metalboxprefabricados.com. We will respond with a proposal tailored to your project.

items.q: Do you manufacture the modules yourselves?
items.a: Metalbox specialises in the assembly, installation and execution of modular construction projects. When a project requires it, we work alongside manufacturing partners, coordinating and managing the complete project from start to finish through a single point of contact.

cta.title: Need a modular solution?
cta.text: Tell us about your project and we will send you a technical and financial proposal, free of obligation.

cookies.text: We use first- and third-party cookies to analyse browsing and improve our services. You can accept all cookies or reject non-essential ones.

aviso.title: Legal Notice
body: Owner: Metalbox Prefabricados Modulares S.L. · Barcelona, Spain.

Access to and use of this website confers the status of user and implies acceptance of these conditions. The content, trademarks, logos and images on this site are the property of Metalbox Prefabricados Modulares S.L. or their rightful owners; reproduction without express authorisation is prohibited.
Metalbox is not responsible for any misuse of the content of this website by users or for damages arising from such use.

privacidad.title: Privacy Policy
body: Data controller: Metalbox Prefabricados Modulares S.L.
Purpose: to manage quote requests and enquiries received through the forms on this website, and any resulting commercial relationship.
Legal basis: the data subject's consent (art. 6.1.a GDPR) and pre-contractual measures (art. 6.1.b GDPR).
Retention: data will be kept for as long as necessary to handle the request and comply with applicable legal obligations.
Rights: you may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction and portability by writing to administracion@metalboxprefabricados.com.
Data will not be transferred to third parties except where legally required.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
body: This website uses technical cookies necessary for its operation and, with prior consent, analytics cookies (Google Analytics) and marketing cookies (Meta Pixel) to measure site usage and improve our services.
You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Rejecting non-essential cookies does not prevent you from browsing the site.
For more information or to withdraw your consent, contact administracion@metalboxprefabricados.com.

construccion-modular.name: Modular Construction
construccion-modular.tagline: Industrialised building: factory precision, architectural results
construccion-modular.description: Construction using prefabricated modules built in a controlled environment and assembled on site. Industrialisation cuts delivery times by up to 60%, guarantees millimetric precision, minimises on-site impact and keeps costs and quality under total control — from standalone projects to complete buildings.
advantages: Lead times up to 60% shorter than traditional construction
Consistent industrial precision and quality
Fixed cost from the design stage, no deviations
Clean sites with minimal environmental impact
benefits: Your building operational and profitable months earlier
One single point of contact with full responsibility
Flexibility to extend or reconfigure in the future

colegios-modulares.description: Prefabricated classrooms, school extensions and complete educational centres: nurseries, schools, secondary schools and universities. Temporary or permanent solutions with climate control, acoustic insulation and full compliance with education regulations, delivered around the academic calendar.
advantages: Guaranteed delivery before the school year starts
Thermal and acoustic comfort equal or superior to conventional classrooms
Compliance with education and accessibility regulations
Expandable or removable as enrolment evolves
benefits: School places available when they are needed
Installation without disrupting school activity
Flexible investment versus traditional construction

contenedores-modulares.name: Modular Containers
contenedores-modulares.description: Container-type modules for offices, warehouses, retail spaces and temporary projects. The fastest solution when operational space is needed immediately: manufactured, transported and installed in record time, and relocated or reused as many times as the project demands.
advantages: Immediate installation with minimal groundwork
Fully reusable and relocatable
Configurable individually or in stacked assemblies
Complete customisation of finishes and services
benefits: Operational space in days, not months
A recoverable asset that retains its value
Scale, relocate or reconfigure without reinvesting

casetas-de-obra.description: Prefabricated cabins to equip any construction site or industrial project: site office, changing rooms, canteen and toilets, as standalone or combined modules. Manufactured in our facilities, transported to the plot, and installed and connected to utilities in a single day — ready for the crew to start work from day one.

Toilets and hygiene modules on site
advantages: Installation and utility connection in a single day
Standalone or combinable modules depending on site size
Thermal and acoustic insulation for year-round use
Relocatable once each phase or project ends
benefits: Site crew operational from day one
A single point of contact for design, transport and installation
No groundwork or complex permits for a temporary installation

Fast installation with minimal groundwork
Optimised formats for maximum liveability
benefits: Monetise your land with contained investment

oficinas-modulares.name: Modular Offices
